## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory 1:1 between Marcel Santilli and Wiets Rossouw to align on expectations, roles, and processes.](https://fathom.video/share/ax3aDzHMdsNW6Y2mqT4Pp9Fw-7EABBYP?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel emphasized the importance of documenting processes, creating systems, and moving towards automation to enable scalable growth](https://fathom.video/share/ax3aDzHMdsNW6Y2mqT4Pp9Fw-7EABBYP?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)
  - [Wiets has a diverse background in politics, operations, and executive assistance that brings valuable experience to the role](https://fathom.video/share/ax3aDzHMdsNW6Y2mqT4Pp9Fw-7EABBYP?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Key focus areas: improving follow-through, building trust, anticipating needs, and enabling Marcel and the leadership team to be more effective](https://fathom.video/share/ax3aDzHMdsNW6Y2mqT4Pp9Fw-7EABBYP?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [Access granted to critical systems (Atio, Google Admin, 1Password, Slack, etc.) to empower Wiets in her role](https://fathom.video/share/ax3aDzHMdsNW6Y2mqT4Pp9Fw-7EABBYP?tab=summary&timestamp=2246.0)

## Topics

### Role Expectations and Approach

  - [Marcel wants Wiets to become an extension of him, anticipating needs and being one step ahead](https://fathom.video/share/ax3aDzHMdsNW6Y2mqT4Pp9Fw-7EABBYP?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [Emphasis on trust-building and becoming comfortable with pushback when needed](https://fathom.video/share/ax3aDzHMdsNW6Y2mqT4Pp9Fw-7EABBYP?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [Goal is to help Marcel, leadership, and eventually the whole company be more effective and efficient](https://fathom.video/share/ax3aDzHMdsNW6Y2mqT4Pp9Fw-7EABBYP?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [Importance of understanding context and priorities, not just executing tasks](https://fathom.video/share/ax3aDzHMdsNW6Y2mqT4Pp9Fw-7EABBYP?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)

### Process Documentation and Improvement

  - [Marcel stressed documenting any process done more than once](https://fathom.video/share/ax3aDzHMdsNW6Y2mqT4Pp9Fw-7EABBYP?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)
  - [Aim to move from executing → documenting → improving → automating → delegating](https://fathom.video/share/ax3aDzHMdsNW6Y2mqT4Pp9Fw-7EABBYP?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [Example given of follow-up process after meetings, with stages of improvement outlined](https://fathom.video/share/ax3aDzHMdsNW6Y2mqT4Pp9Fw-7EABBYP?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [Encouraged use of Notion for documentation, with suggestion to take courses if needed](https://fathom.video/share/ax3aDzHMdsNW6Y2mqT4Pp9Fw-7EABBYP?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)

### Systems and Tools Overview

  - [Walked through key systems: Atio (CRM), Google Admin, Slack, 1Password, Zoom](https://fathom.video/share/ax3aDzHMdsNW6Y2mqT4Pp9Fw-7EABBYP?tab=summary&timestamp=2246.0)
  - [Discussed importance of user management and cost control in tools like Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/ax3aDzHMdsNW6Y2mqT4Pp9Fw-7EABBYP?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
  - [Granted necessary admin access to Wiets for critical systems](https://fathom.video/share/ax3aDzHMdsNW6Y2mqT4Pp9Fw-7EABBYP?tab=summary&timestamp=2246.0)

### Wiets' Background and Experience

  - [Diverse career including roles in politics, operations, HR, and executive assistance](https://fathom.video/share/ax3aDzHMdsNW6Y2mqT4Pp9Fw-7EABBYP?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Experience with campaign management, distribution/warehouse management, and system implementations](https://fathom.video/share/ax3aDzHMdsNW6Y2mqT4Pp9Fw-7EABBYP?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)
  - [Strong belief in the importance of the PA-executive relationship and anticipating needs](https://fathom.video/share/ax3aDzHMdsNW6Y2mqT4Pp9Fw-7EABBYP?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

### Operational Priorities

  - [Focus on creating SOPs for onboarding/offboarding](https://fathom.video/share/ax3aDzHMdsNW6Y2mqT4Pp9Fw-7EABBYP?tab=summary&timestamp=2825.0)
  - [Keeping Slack channels organized and relevant](https://fathom.video/share/ax3aDzHMdsNW6Y2mqT4Pp9Fw-7EABBYP?tab=summary&timestamp=2449.0)
  - [Managing user access across various platforms to control costs](https://fathom.video/share/ax3aDzHMdsNW6Y2mqT4Pp9Fw-7EABBYP?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
  - [Importance of personalizing employee profiles in systems for better connection](https://fathom.video/share/ax3aDzHMdsNW6Y2mqT4Pp9Fw-7EABBYP?tab=summary&timestamp=2957.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Wiets to document onboarding and offboarding processes in Notion](https://fathom.video/share/ax3aDzHMdsNW6Y2mqT4Pp9Fw-7EABBYP?tab=summary&timestamp=2825.0)
  - [Set up and familiarize with newly granted system accesses (Atio, Google Admin, 1Password, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/ax3aDzHMdsNW6Y2mqT4Pp9Fw-7EABBYP?tab=summary&timestamp=2246.0)
  - [Begin creating SOPs for recurring processes](https://fathom.video/share/ax3aDzHMdsNW6Y2mqT4Pp9Fw-7EABBYP?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)
  - [Wiets to send Marcel the book recommendation ("Time to Think" by Nancy Kline)](https://fathom.video/share/ax3aDzHMdsNW6Y2mqT4Pp9Fw-7EABBYP?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up 1:1 to continue alignment and discuss additional responsibilities](https://fathom.video/share/ax3aDzHMdsNW6Y2mqT4Pp9Fw-7EABBYP?tab=summary&timestamp=2980.0)
